title: OptiFabricium
description: OptiFabricium is an extreme performance-focused Fabric modpack built to deliver maximum FPS, minimal lag, and ultra-smooth gameplay — all while keeping the vanilla Minecraft experience intact.
body:
# OptiFabricium

**OptiFabricium** is an extreme performance-focused Fabric modpack engineered to deliver the highest possible FPS and the smoothest gameplay experience.

Built like a performance compound, this pack combines the most powerful optimization technologies available on Fabric — removing overhead, reducing lag, and maximizing stability without changing vanilla gameplay.

## ⚡ Core Focus
- Maximum FPS
- Reduced lag and stutters
- Faster chunk loading
- Improved frame pacing
- Multiplayer-friendly
- Vanilla gameplay preserved

## 💻 Perfect For
- Low-end PCs and laptops
- PvP players
- Servers and SMP
- Large worlds
- Anyone who wants raw performance over visuals
